name: Woof Pupsicle Starter Set
description: Puzzle dog toy with re-freezable treat mold and chicken treats. Available in small, large, and extra-large sizes.

name: Just Food For Dogs Fish & Sweet Potato Meals (7-Pack)
description: Fresh high-protein dog food pouches for sensitive stomachs. Lasts 18 months frozen, 7 days refrigerated.

name: Beef-Flavored Dog Treat Sticks
description: Hard, flexible beef-flavored sticks. Keeps dogs entertained for several minutes. Suitable for small dogs.

name: Mrs. Meyer's Dog Coat Conditioning Spray
description: Conditions and adds shine to dog coat, reduces odor. Contains glycerin, oat extract, aloe, chamomile, rosemary.

name: Front-Clip Dog Harness
description: Front-clip harness to reduce pulling. Lightly padded, breathable, easy-to-adjust straps. Sizes XS through XL.

name: Dog Puzzle Slow Feeder Toy (24 Compartments)
description: Mentally stimulating puzzle toy with 24 compartments and sliding tray. Slows eating and hides treats/kibble.
